channel.title: sera on meorion
channel.description: Recent content in sera on meorion

item.title: Qs and As
item.description:
Some questions occurred to me today, and I think we have the answer
(updated: Jul-24th 2022, Jul-15th 2022. original 2022-06-25)

item.title: sera
item.description: moon of moon a moon can have a moon. a moon does have a moon. this moon. which was the moon. seemed easy to figure out. joyce told her, but she didn’t see it that way. sometimes. sometimes when she woke and rose and stared at the landscape. from outside, the ship. thru the field. not through a screen or electric viewport. sometimes. it seemed like it was the other way.

item.title: mom's journal
item.description: Chant and then encant enchant. Spoke and then encant enspoke.
